channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: IRS will lay off thousands of probationary workers in the middle of tax season
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The IRS will lay off thousands of probationary workers in the middle of tax season, according to two sources familiar with the agency's plans, and cuts could happen as soon as next week.
item.dc:creator: FATIMA HUSSEIN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: What does 'Wawa' even mean? The company offers up a hint
item.description: In certain communities along the East Coast, the mere mention of the name “Wawa” conjures up visions of piping-hot coffee, scratch-off lottery tickets and pre-made Sizzli breakfast sandwiches.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, Fox 5

item.title: AP reporter and photographer barred from Air Force One over 'Gulf of Mexico' terminology dispute
item.description: The White House barred a credentialed Associated Press reporter and photographer from boarding the presidential airplane Friday for a weekend trip with Donald Trump, saying the news agency’s stance on how to refer to the Gulf of Mexico was to blame for the exclusion.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BAUDER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Back-to-back earthquakes jolt Los Angeles area within hours
item.description: An earthquake with a preliminary magnitude of 3.5 rattled the L.A. metropolitan area early Saturday just hours after a 3.8-magnitude quake shook the Malibu area shortly before midnight Friday.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KREX 5

item.title: Rodeo rider cheats death when bull's horn slices neck open
item.description: A fearless rodeo rider in Florida had a close brush with death when the bull he was riding gored him in the neck while being bucked off the beast’s back.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: White South Africans gather in support of Trump and his claims that they are victims of racism
item.description: PRETORIA, South Africa (AP) — Some white South Africans showed support for President Donald Trump on Saturday and gathered at the U.S. Embassy in Pretoria to claim they are victims of racism by their own government.
item.dc:creator: ALFONSO NQUNJANA and GERALD IMRAY, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Trump moves with dizzying speed on his to-do list. But there are warning signs in his first month
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — As President Donald Trump approaches the first-month mark in his second term, he has moved with dizzying speed and blunt force to reorder American social and political norms and the economy while redefining the U.S. role in the world.
item.dc:creator: WILL WEISSERT, JOSH BOAK and LINDSAY WHITEHURST, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Miami Beach gives spring break troublemakers a 'reality check' with viral TV-themed video
item.description: Miami Beach, Florida, may not be a desired destination next month as city officials shared a reality TV-themed warning on Tuesday aimed at steering away raucous spring breakers.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: As Trump administration reforms the EPA, cleanups of America's most toxic sites are uncertain
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Just over a mile from where Patricia Flores has lived for almost 20 years, a battery smelter plant spewed toxic elements into the environment for nearly a century.
item.dc:creator: DORANY PINEDA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Eastern U.S. braces for flooding while fire-damaged California city now faces mudslides
item.description: SIERRA MADRE, Calif. (AP) — Much of the Eastern U.S. braced for a renewed round of harsh, soggy weather on Saturday, with thunderstorms and melting snow combining to pound the Ohio and Tennessee valleys. The lower Mississippi valley was facing the threat of strong tornadoes.
item.dc:creator: OLGA R. RODRIGUEZ and EUGENE GARCIA, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: UFO expert says Trump's declassification could expose possible 'cover-up' spanning decades
item.description: An expert on UFOs breaks down the importance of President Trump declassifying government files he believes holds "the smoking gun" and answers to federal secrets.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Black Hawk pilots may have missed air traffic directive, flown on 'bad' altitude data before crash
item.description: It is likely the Black Hawk pilots “stepped on” the communication for less than a second by pressing the microphone key to communicate back to the control tower, she said.
item.dc:creator: Ellen Mitchell, ABC 4

item.title: Left-hander Cole Ragans and Royals agree to $13.25 million, 3-year contract
item.description: All-Star left-hander Cole Ragans and the Kansas City Royals agreed Friday to a $13.25 million, three-year contract.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: What is Area 51? What we know about the military installation
item.description: Military veterans say they were exposed to radiation near Area 51, and many are now suffering from severe health issues.
item.dc:creator: Liz Jassin, NewsNation

item.title: Abortions to resume in Missouri after a judge blocks restrictions
item.description: COLUMBIA, Mo. (AP) — Abortions are set to resume in Missouri after a judge blocked regulations that had restricted providers even after voters approved enshrining abortion rights into the state’s constitution.
item.dc:creator: SUMMER BALLENTINE and HALLIE GOLDEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Homeowner pleads guilty to shooting Black teen Ralph Yarl who rang the wrong doorbell
item.description: LIBERTY, Mo. (AP) — An 86-year-old Kansas City man pleaded guilty Friday to a lesser charge in the 2023 shooting of Ralph Yarl, a Black honor student who rang the white man’s doorbell by mistake, in a case that shocked the country and renewed national debate about gun policies and race in the U.S.
item.dc:creator: HEATHER HOLLINGSWORTH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Justice Department moves to dismiss Eric Adams case
item.description: The Department of Justice (DOJ) has formally asked a federal district court to drop its corruption charges against New York City Mayor Eric Adams (D) after federal prosecutors in Manhattan resigned rather than dismiss the case.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, NewsNation

item.title: Proposed bill looks to make President Trump’s birthday a federal holiday
item.description: Rep. Claudia Tenney (R-N.Y.) announced Friday a proposed bill, the Establishment Act, which seeks to make President Trump’s birthday and Flag Day a federal holiday in the United States.
item.dc:creator: Daesha Gear, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: More adults are ordering fast-food kids’ meals: Here’s why
item.description: For decades, fast-food has been America's common denominator. No matter if you were rich or poor or somewhere in the middle, you could always count on a quick, cheap meal at a burger joint, fried chicken restaurant or taco shop. Today, fast-food is still – fast.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, KTLA 5

item.title: US Army bans transgender people from enlisting
item.description: The new policies, effective immediately, could affect more than 10,000 active duty troops, per AP estimates.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: Volunteers deliver gifts to widows on Valentine's Day. The project began in a florist's driveway
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — Jillian Myers knows the devastation of losing a husband and feeling alone and empty, particularly on Valentine's Day.
item.dc:creator: ERIK VERDUZCO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump border czar and NYC mayor interview with 'Fox & Friends' on immigration commitments
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Reestablishing an immigration office at New York's notorious Rikers Island jail is just the first step in a more complex agreement President Donald Trump's administration has reached with Democratic Mayor Eric Adams, the new U.S.
item.dc:creator: CEDAR ATTANASIO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: US Park Service removes transgender references from Stonewall National Monument website
item.description: The change, which has sparked an outcry among the LGBTQ+ community, came after President Trump signed an executive order directing federal agencies to recognize only two genders.
item.dc:creator: Matthew Euzarraga, Fox 5

item.title: Justice Department asks court to dismiss corruption charges against New York City Mayor Eric Adams
item.description: The Justice Department has asked a court to drop corruption charges against New York City Mayor Eric Adams.
item.dc:creator: Michael R. Sisak And Larry Neumeister, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Trump's framed mug shot hangs outside Oval Office
item.description: A framed image of President Donald Trump's mug shot from when he was indicted in Georgia in 2023 is hanging outside the Oval Office in the latest bit of redecorating since he moved back in.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: DOGE gets mixed reviews from conservatives who have long wanted major budget cuts
item.description: DES MOINES, Iowa (AP) — Conservatives who have spent decades promoting deep cuts to government are giving mixed reviews to the Department of Government Efficiency, the Elon Musk-led project to slash the federal workforce and reduce or end disfavored programs.
item.dc:creator: THOMAS BEAUMONT, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: ICE deports migrant gang member who illegally entered US 10 times and is wanted for murder
item.description: A gang member who entered the U.S. illegally 10 times over the last 23 years and is wanted for murder in Mexico has been deported, Immigration and Customs Enforcement announced on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: CBP officer pleads not guilty to migrant smuggling, drug conspiracy
item.description: A U.S. Customs and Border Protection officer charged with multiple counts of violating immigration and drug laws has pleaded not guilty to the charges, court documents show.
item.dc:creator: Julian Resendiz, KTLA 5

item.title: WATCH: Driver in Utah escapes car before train smashes into vehicle
item.description: Video appears to show that the SUV may have been pushed onto the tracks by another vehicle, just as the crossing gates were beginning to lower.
item.dc:creator: Aubree B. Jennings, Fox 5

item.title: These restaurants are spreading the love with discounts, freebies this Valentine's Day
item.description: LOS ANGELES (KTLA) – Restaurants and food chains nationwide are spreading the love this Valentine’s Day with freebies and discounts. Whether you have a Valentine or plan to spend the day solo, here are some deals available.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, KTLA 5

item.title: Deadly DC plane crash investigation examining helicopter altitude
item.description: In the weeks since the crash, the NTSB has been analyzing flight data and damage to determine how this happened.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: American beauty queen charged in ex-NFL husband's murder plot granted release from Bahamas prison: report
item.description: Georgia mom Lindsay Shiver, who is accused of plotting to hire a hitman to kill her estranged husband, ex-NFL player Robert Shiver is reportedly being released on bail.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 83 percent say president is required to follow Supreme Court rulings: Survey
item.description: Just over half, 51 percent, of Americans approve of the job the Supreme Court is doing, which is the highest amount of support it’s received in the last three years.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, Fox 5

item.title: Former longtime Illinois legislative leader Michael Madigan is convicted in corruption trial
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — A Chicago Democrat who once set much of Illinois’ political agenda as the longest-serving legislative leader in U.S. history was convicted of conspiracy, bribery and wire fraud Wednesday in a split verdict in his high-profile corruption trial.
item.dc:creator: SOPHIA TAREEN, Associated Press, ABC 4
